untranslatable_reason: Signal requires implementation of a recency-weighted volatility forecasting algorithm that cannot be expressed as simple indicator comparisons. The weighting scheme needs dynamic period-by-period weighting that favors recent observations—this requires custom calculation logic beyond allowed operators and indicators. hvol_20 provides historical volatility but not the recency-weighted forecast computation described in the rule.
translation_notes: This signal describes a volatility forecasting methodology (weighted average with recency bias) rather than a tradeable entry/exit condition. The source text suggests comparing simple averages (24%, 20%, 18%, 18%) with weighted alternatives, but the actual weighted forecast values and decision thresholds are not specified. A proper implementation would require a custom volatility forecaster module outside the standard indicator set.
